title: paspalum barclayi
intro: Paspalum barclayi, also known as Barclay's grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Paspalum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum barclayi include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and injuries. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in topical creams and ointments.
